title: Total Nucleic Acid Extraction Using NucleoMag® DNA/RNA Water Kit
author: Adélaïde Roguet

steps.title: For Direct extraction , add 150...
steps.instruction: For Direct extraction , add 150 µL of wastewater to the 2-mL tube containing 100 µL CTAB. Vortex for 15 seconds (speed 7 out of

steps.title: and flash freeze the tube
steps.instruction: and flash freeze the tube. Go to step 4.

steps.title: For HA filter extraction, place the...
steps.instruction: For HA filter extraction, place the 2-mL tubes in the bead beater. Mini-Beadbeater-16 (high-energy cell disrupter, BioSpec, 607, 1 speed, https://biospec.com/product/mini-beadbeater-16 )

steps.title: Bead beat for 00:02:30 Start the...
steps.instruction: Bead beat for 00:02:30 Start the bead beating when the beads start to be loose in the tubes.

steps.title: Cooldown the samples on ice for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Cooldown the samples on ice for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Repeat Steps 9
steps.instruction: Repeat Steps 9.1 and 9.2 once go to step #2.1 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 min at room temperature. 150000 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute

steps.title: For HA filter extraction, transfer 400...
steps.instruction: For HA filter extraction, transfer 400 µL of supernatant to the Lysis/Bind plate . For BCoV/BRSV/Direct extraction , transfer all supernatant to the Lysis/Bind plate .

steps.title: Start the protocol MN_96_Flex
steps.instruction: Start the protocol MN_96_Flex.bdz on the KingFisher Flex 01:14:00 Kingfisher Flex (Automated Extraction System, ThermoFisher, 5400630)

steps.title: Transfer the purified sample from the...
steps.instruction: Transfer the purified sample from the Elution plate to the microcentrifuge tubes . The DNA/RNA is now ready for downstream applications. RNA extract may be stored in RNase-free water at -80ºC for 1 year.
